# CWE-1236 negative: CSV cells escaped against formulas (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1236-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1236 mitigated: dangerous leading characters prefixed before CSV export.

import (
	"encoding/csv"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

type FeedbackSafePure struct {
	ID      int
	Comment string
}

func sanitizeCSVFieldPure(value string) string {
	if value == "" {
		return value
	}
	switch value[0] {
	case '=', '+', '-', '@', '\t', '\r':
		return "'" + value
	default:
		return value
	}
}

func ExportFeedbackCSVSafePure(rows []FeedbackSafePure) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var b strings.Builder
		wr := csv.NewWriter(&b)
		_ = wr.Write([]string{"id", "comment"})
		for _, row := range rows {
			_ = wr.Write([]string{
				strconv.Itoa(row.ID),
				sanitizeCSVFieldPure(row.Comment),
			})
		}
		wr.Flush()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/csv")
		w.Write([]byte(b.String()))
	}
}
